events.title: Newsletter — 2nd Tuesday
events.description: Next scheduled newsletter (Jen/Thomas cadence: 2nd & 4th Tuesdays). Content and next "One Act of Faithfulness" action still TBD.

events.title: FHC July Monthly Gathering
events.description: Monthly Faith & Housing Coalition gathering. RSVP link forthcoming.

events.title: Alex — IV Trek / Personal Time
events.description: Alex out June 17 – August 3 (in progress). Thomas leads all action coordination during this window. Sabbatical follows Aug–Dec.

events.title: AB 1070 — Senate Appropriations Hearing
events.description: Building Code Reform (2-10 units). Passed Senate Housing 10-0 (6/24), currently in Sen. Approps.

events.title: STATE DEADLINE: 2nd House Fiscal (Approps)
events.description: All bills must clear Appropriations. AB 1070, AB 2074, and SB 1116 are all still sitting in their chamber's Appropriations committee awaiting hearings ahead of this deadline.

events.title: STATE: Final Floor Session & Votes
events.description: Last window for all bills to pass both chambers before Governor deadline.

events.title: FHC August Monthly Gathering
events.description: Monthly Faith & Housing gathering. Legislative push will be in full swing.

events.title: STATE DEADLINE: Governor Signs / Vetoes
events.description: Last day for Governor to sign or veto all 2025–2026 session bills.

calendar.status: SB 1116 & AB 2074 advanced to Appropriations; AB 1903 & AB 1406 missed the cutoff and appear at risk (confirm w/ committee staff)

tier2Actions.notes: Cleared Asm. Local Gov 10-0 (7/1) — now in Asm. Approps
Cleared both policy committees — now in Sen. Approps; letter urgently needed
Deadline passed 7/2 without a Sen. Housing hearing — at risk
Deadline passed 7/2 with no rescheduled hearing — likely dead

activeActionNotes.label: Active — AB 2480 Floor Vote Imminent
activeActionNotes.text: AB 2480 remains on the Senate 3rd Reading file (Item 210) — a full floor vote could happen any day now that the Senate is back in regular session. This is the furthest along of our 6 tracked bills. FHC letter in progress (Thomas).

activeActionNotes.label: Priority — AB 2074 Letter Now Urgent
activeActionNotes.text: AB 2074 cleared both Sen. Housing (6–0) and Sen. Local Gov (6–0) and is now in Sen. Appropriations. Its letter still hasn't been started — get it in before a fiscal hearing date is set.

activeActionNotes.label: Watch — AB 1903 & AB 1406 Deadline Risk
activeActionNotes.text: Neither bill got a hearing before the July 2 2nd-house policy deadline: AB 1903 is stuck after Sen. Judiciary with no Sen. Housing hearing ever posted, and AB 1406's hearing (canceled 6/29) was never rescheduled. Both appear to be at high risk of dying for the session — worth confirming directly with committee staff.

activeActionNotes.label: Active Action — Transfer Tax Reform (AB 736)
activeActionNotes.text: AB 736 is now a public bill. Call and email your legislators to support it.

contacts.name: Thomas
contacts.note: Sole coordinator while Alex on Trek (thru Aug 3)

recentNotes.label: Jul 8 — Daily Leginfo Check: Second Day With No Movement
recentNotes.text: Live check of all 6 bills shows no committee actions since the July 2 deadline — identical status to yesterday's check. AB 2480 remains on the Senate 3rd Reading file awaiting a floor vote; AB 2074 and SB 1116 are both still sitting in their chamber's Appropriations committee with no hearing date posted; AB 1903 and AB 1406 remain stalled with no hearing scheduled.

recentNotes.label: Comms — 7/6 Newsletter Recap
recentNotes.text: The 7/6 newsletter draft recapped the June Gathering (with slides), Jeff's testimony, condo bills, transfer tax reform, and SB 79. Next newsletter is due the 2nd Tuesday, Jul 14 — content and next "One Act of Faithfulness" action still TBD.

recentNotes.label: Open Follow-Ups (from Jun 2 Planning Mtg)
recentNotes.text: Alex: follow up with Matt Hayashida, Vero, and Faith (text action alerts / videos / call script via Action Network); also loop in Ji to contact people while Alex is away. Thomas: follow up with the Chius and Tiff (mobilization delegate).

recentNotes.label: Action Item — Pending Letters
recentNotes.text: Thomas is working on letters for AB 1903, AB 1406, AB 1070, AB 2480. AB 2074's letter is still not started — now that it has cleared both policy committees, getting this letter in before a fiscal hearing is set is the top priority.
